summary: Completed testing of Druglift-style gig management workflow. All 5 requested features verified working: Per-order unassign driver (POST /api/routes/{gigId}/orders/{orderId}/unassign), Split gig keeps assigned driver with moved orders, QR code display in order detail modal using qrserver.com API, Admin login and Routes page navigation, Gig detail with unassign button for assigned orders.
seed_data_creation: Used existing gigs (Brooklyn - 2026-02-21, Queens - Part 2) for testing. Created test split gig 'Brooklyn Part 2 - Test Split' during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Druglift-style gig management features working. Per-order unassign endpoint at POST /api/routes/{gigId}/orders/{orderId}/unassign. Split gig preserves driver assignment. QR codes displayed using qrserver.com API. Unassign button only appears for orders with status 'assigned'.

evidence: API endpoint returns 200 with message 'Driver unassigned from order {orderNumber}'
Order status changes from 'assigned' to 'new'
Order remains in gig after unassign (not removed)
Gig status changes to 'draft' when all orders are unassigned
Returns 400 when trying to unassign non-assigned order
POST /api/routes/{id}/split moves orders to new gig
Moved orders retain their DriverId and DriverName
Driver is automatically added to new gig's driver list
New gig status set to 'assigned' when orders have drivers
Order's RoutePlanId updated to new gig ID
QR code image displayed using qrserver.com API
URL format: https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=120x120&data={qrCode}
QR code text displayed below image
Print QR Label button available in modal
Login at /home/login with admin credentials
Dashboard loads at /Admin/Index
Routes page accessible at /Admin/Routes via sidebar navigation
8 gig cards displayed on Routes page
Gig detail modal shows orders table with columns: #, ORDER, QR, RECIPIENT, CITY, STATUS, DRIVER
Unassign button visible for orders with status 'assigned' and driverName set
Unassign button triggers per-order unassign API
Toast notification 'Driver unassigned from order {orderNumber}' shown after unassign
Modal refreshes to show updated order status

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/routes/{id} - PASS (gig detail with orders and drivers)
POST /api/routes/{id}/split - PASS (split gig with driver preservation)
GET /api/admin/orders - PASS (orders list with QR codes)
ui_flows_tested: Gig detail modal with orders table
Per-order unassign button click and confirmation
Order detail modal with QR code display
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working correctly as specified
